response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse full-stack experience, but lacks explicit leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and German language proficiency — critical for this executive role. His remote work history and project management exposure are positives, but his resume shows no evidence of team leadership, client advisory, or compliance/risk experience required for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Strong full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (DLang, Node.js, Linux)
Proven ability to lead technical projects independently and mentor via workshops
concerns: German proficiency listed as 'Basic' — fails minimum C1 requirement
No evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Lacks documented team leadership or project management of interdisciplinary teams
